action.reasoning: Observation: Refinement model PESQ=2.62, worse than MetricGAN+ baseline=3.13. CRN=2.70. Analysis: Custom models underperform. Need a proven architecture trained properly. Decision: Try ConvTasNet from asteroid (proven SE architecture) trained for 50 epochs. Also try a better refinement approach with very small residual learning from MetricGAN+ output.
